flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Baker University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.7k → $35.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Baker University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.7k → $35.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Baker University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Baker University are 23% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.9k vs $52.1k).
